channel.title: data model on Utsav's blog
channel.description: Recent content in data model on Utsav's blog

item.title: Python Notes, Part 1 - Data Model
item.description: This series of python posts will be based on the book Fluent Python by Luciano Ramalho. My goal is to recollect as much as possible from memory and hopefully use/create some new examples other than those already mentioned in the book. One of the best things about python is it’s consistency. Once someone has spent enough time with python and it’s ecosystem, they tend to adapt easily to new tools, modules as long as they are written in a pythonic way.
